files.content: // shadcn import { Accordion, AccordionContent, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger } from "@/components/ui/accordion"; // ------------------------------ | ACCORDION MULTIPLE | ------------------------------ // export default function AccordionMultiple() { return ( Accordion Item #1 This is the first item's accordion body. It is hidden by default, until the collapse plugin adds the appropriate classes that we use to style each element. Accordion Item #2 This is the second item's accordion body. It is hidden by default, until the collapse plugin adds the appropriate classes that we use to style each element. Accordion Item #3 This is the third item's accordion body. It is hidden by default, until the collapse plugin adds the appropriate classes that we use to style each element. ); }
